nodes.name: Sheppardia
nodes.summary: Sheppardia（Sheppardia）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Grey-winged robin-chat、Bocage's akalat、Lowland akalat等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Iringa akalat
nodes.summary: The Iringa akalat (Sheppardia lowei) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Iringa Region of Tanzania. The species is named after the collector Willoughby Prescott Lowe. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The Iringa akalat (Sheppardia lowei) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Iringa Region of Tanzania.
